steps.title: Translate volume to weight
steps.content: The boulder weighs $150$ pounds per cubic foot, so total weight equals $150$ times volume.

steps.title: Multiply the volume bounds
steps.content: The volume satisfies $$12.4\lt V\lt16.4$$ Multiplying all parts by positive $150$ preserves the inequality direction: $$150(12.4)\lt x\lt150(16.4)$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The correct answer matches this inequality, so C is correct.
